title: SQL Queries Concept Check 1
questionText: Which statement best describes a key concept in SQL Queries?
options: SQL Queries should be analyzed using correctness, complexity, and edge cases.
SQL Queries never affects performance.
SQL Queries is only useful in frontend styling.
SQL Queries cannot be discussed in interviews.
explanation: A good technical answer explains SQL Queries, why it matters, complexity or trade-offs, and an example edge case.
